summary: Comprehensive testing of Shri Maruti Logistics (Innofulfill) dashboard. All features tested and working: Rate Calculator, Booking Form, Shipments List, Order Tracking, API Connection status, and Tab Navigation. Fixed missing sidebar link for 'Shri Maruti' under Shipping section.
critical_code_review_comments: LogisticsDashboard.jsx: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes for testing
logistics.py routes: All endpoints properly implemented with error handling
innofulfill_service.py: Token caching and auto-refresh working correctly
ShopifySidebar.jsx: Added missing 'Shri Maruti' link under Shipping section
seed_data_creation: Existing booking TNVC-TEST-002 with AWB TNVC0000000004 used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logistics dashboard fully tested. All features working: 1) Rate Calculator - enter pincodes and weight, click Compare Rates, Surface (₹90) and Air (₹130) rates display correctly. 2) Book tab - shipping address fields, order details, delivery mode selector all present. 3) Shipments tab - lists existing booking TNVC-TEST-002 from API. 4) Track tab - AWB TNVC0000000004 shows ORDER CONFIRMED status at Delhi. 5) API Connected badge shows green. 6) Tab switching works. 7) Sidebar 'Shri Maruti' link under Shipping section navigates to /logistics.

rate_calculator.details: Enter pincodes (110001 -> 400001) and weight (500g), click Compare Rates, Surface (₹90) and Air (₹130) rates display with full details

booking_form.details: Shipping address fields (name, phone, address, city, state, pincode), Order details (order ID, amount, weight, delivery mode), Book Shipment button all present

shipments_list.details: Lists existing booking TNVC-TEST-002 with AWB TNVC0000000004, status Booked, SURFACE delivery, Mumbai destination, ₹8,500

order_tracking.details: AWB TNVC0000000004 shows ORDER CONFIRMED status, Location: Delhi, Carrier: innofulfill, with tracking history

api_connected_badge.details: Green 'API Connected' badge visible in header

tab_navigation.details: Rates, Book, Shipments, Track tabs all switch correctly

sidebar_navigation.details: Shri Maruti link under Shipping section navigates to /logistics (fixed during testing)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real Innofulfill API calls - no mocking
